title: Grounding with Google Search
summary: Attach Google Search as a tool. The model issues web queries when a prompt needs fresh facts and returns sources you can cite via grounding_metadata.

docs.label: Grounding with Google Search — Gemini API

notes: Search-grounded responses bill the underlying token cost plus a per-request grounding fee — refer to the pricing page.

grounding_metadata.web_search_queries lists the exact queries the model issued; grounding_chunks gives the URI + title for each source; grounding_supports maps response text segments back to source indices for citation.
Search grounding cannot be combined with arbitrary user-defined function tools in the same call — pick one or the other per request.
